Why Choose Us

The Standard Others
Measure Against

01

Mill-Direct Sourcing

We source exclusively from ISO-certified mills, cutting out intermediaries and guaranteeing authentic grade steel at every order.

02

Full Documentation

Every shipment arrives with Mill Test Reports, Certificate of Origin, SGS third-party inspection, and full compliance paperwork.

03

End-to-End Logistics

We own the entire maritime export chain — from mill yard to destination port, with real-time cargo tracking and insurance coverage.

04

On-Time Delivery

Project timelines are non-negotiable. Our logistics team ensures your steel arrives on schedule, every single time, worldwide.

05

Technical Support

Our engineers assist with specification matching, grade selection, and custom dimension requirements for any project complexity.

06

Certified Quality

100% of our shipments carry internationally recognised certifications — IS, ASTM, EN, and BS standards across all product grades.

"
Materials are not just commodities — they are the foundation of civilisation. Every shipment we send carries a promise: that what rises will endure.
— ForgeWorld International
Our Vision & Mission

Built on Purpose.
Driven by Precision.

Vision

To be the most trusted name in global construction materials export — a company synonymous with integrity, technical excellence, and the kind of reliability that lets engineers sleep at night knowing their supply chain is secure.

Mission

We connect world-class manufacturers — including India's leading material producers, renowned for quality and craftsmanship — to the world's most demanding construction markets. By owning every step — sourcing, certification, logistics, and support — we eliminate risk and deliver certainty.

Values
Integrity Precision Reliability Innovation Sustainability
What We Do

Our Core Services

From mill floor to project site — every step handled with precision.

01

Steel Procurement

Direct access to premium-grade TMT rebar, structural sections, hollow tubes, and specialty coated steel from certified mills across India and Southeast Asia.

Explore Products →
02

Global Export & Logistics

Full freight management from Kerala's major ports to 25+ destination countries. We handle booking, customs documentation, marine insurance, and last-mile coordination.

View Trade Map →
03

Quality Certification

Third-party SGS inspections, Mill Test Reports, Certificate of Origin, MSMI compliance, and full EN 10204 3.1 documentation for every consignment.

View Certifications →
04

Technical Consulting

Project-specific grade selection, specification mapping against local building codes, and engineering support for complex structural requirements.

Talk to an Expert →
05

Custom Fabrication Supply

Sourcing of cut-to-length rebar, bent bars, and pre-fabricated reinforcement cages per project drawings — delivered ready for placement.

Get a Custom Quote →
06

Market Intelligence

Real-time steel pricing, LME benchmarks, trade compliance updates, and regional market reports to help you purchase at the right time and price.

Subscribe to Reports →

Expanding Portfolio

Expanding beyond steel — cement & clinker, aggregates, waterproofing systems, construction chemicals, and more. Inquire for current availability.

Compliance

International Verification Credentials

Strict adherence to global quality parameters guarantees zero-defect structural integration.

ISO 9001:2015 Management

Global baseline standardization validating end-to-end trace documentation, rigorous source tracking, and supply distribution logistics chain safety protocols.

SGS Quality Inspection Clearance

Mandatory third-party pre-shipment testing batch validation, ensuring material chemical composition and tensile values perfectly match engineering project configurations safely.

ASTM & EN Compliance Standards

All metallurgy products conform strictly to American Society for Testing and Materials standards alongside European Normalization guidelines for structural framework integrity.

Traceable Mill Test Certificates (MTC)

Direct authentic factory certified documentation matching EN 10204 Type 3.1 is forwarded immediately with all maritime bills of lading for total validation transparency.

Reference Allocations

Supply Execution Portfolio

Documented procurement allocations across Maldives and UAE markets — each delivery executed with full mill certification, third-party inspection, and port-to-port logistics coordination.

5 allocations shown
✓  Completed 2024
🇲🇻  Maldives · South Male Atoll
Lagoon View Residential Tower — Hulhumalé
Challenge: Saltwater foundations on reclaimed coral land

Full reinforcement package supply for a 12-storey residential development on reclaimed land in Hulhumalé Phase II. The coral seabed and constant saltwater exposure demanded CRS-grade rebar with chloride resistance certification — standard rebar would have begun corroding within 5 years. Complete mill-to-site documentation chain including MSMI type approval, SGS pre-shipment inspection, and EN 10204 Type 3.1 MTC provided.

Fe 500D CRS IS 1786:2008 MSMI Approved SGS Inspected MTC 3.1 CIF Malé Port

How We Work

From Enquiry to Delivery

Every order follows a clear, documented process — from the moment you contact us to the day steel arrives at your port.

STEP 01

Enquiry & Specification Review

You send us your requirements — product type, grade, quantity, destination port, and timeline. Our team reviews your specifications, confirms the right grade for your market and environment, and responds with availability and initial pricing within 24 hours.

Product Grade Confirmation Market Certification Check 24h Response
STEP 02

Mill Sourcing & Formal Quote

We approach our certified mill partners to confirm stock availability, production schedules, and pricing for your exact specification. A formal commercial quote is issued with full product details, applicable certifications, and port-to-port lead time.

Mill Stock Verification Formal Proforma Invoice Cert Availability Confirmed
STEP 03

Order Confirmation & Documentation

Once you confirm the order, a purchase agreement and Letter of Credit or advance payment is arranged. We simultaneously prepare all trade documentation — commercial invoice, packing list, Certificate of Origin, and the Mill Test Certificate (EN 10204 Type 3.1).

Purchase Agreement LC / Payment Arrangement MTC · CoO · Invoice
STEP 04

Production & Mill Quality Control

The mill produces or allocates your order to specification. Every heat batch undergoes chemical composition testing, mechanical property verification (yield strength, UTS, elongation), and dimensional checks. Full traceability is maintained from cast number to delivery.

Chemical Composition Test Yield & Tensile Strength Dimensional Check Heat Number Traceability
STEP 05

Pre-Shipment Inspection

An independent third-party inspector — SGS, Bureau Veritas, or Intertek — physically inspects the goods at the mill or warehouse before loading. They verify quantity, dimensions, surface condition, markings, and cross-check against the Mill Test Certificate. A Pre-Shipment Inspection Report is issued.

SGS / BV / Intertek Physical Quantity Check PSI Report Issued
STEP 06

Freight, Loading & Maritime Shipping

Steel is loaded onto the vessel — bulk carrier or container, depending on quantity and destination. We coordinate the freight forwarder, obtain the Bill of Lading, arrange full marine cargo insurance, and send you a complete shipping document package including packing list and B/L copy.

Bill of Lading Marine Cargo Insurance Full Document Package
STEP 07

Port Arrival, Customs & Handover

We support you through customs clearance at your destination port — providing all required documentation for import: Certificate of Origin, MTC, commercial invoice, packing list, and inspection reports. Once cleared, the material is yours. We remain available for any post-delivery technical queries.

Container Load Planner
Weight0 kg / 28,200 kg
Volume0.00 m³ / 33.2 m³
Select products above and enter quantity to see how they load.
Weight-limited — the container hits its weight cap before it runs out of physical space. Typical for steel, stone, and ceramic.  ·  Volume-limited — the container fills up with space before it gets heavy. Typical for pipe and lightweight hollow goods.
Figures use standard industry packing-efficiency estimates per material type — confirm the exact loading plan with our logistics team before booking.
